metadata.title: Mithril Snapshot UX Refinement Tasks
metadata.description: Decompose MithrilBootstrap into sub-components, add stepper UX, download metadata, stage-specific errors, custom chain storage location (symlink-based directory redirection), theme variables (via theme-management skill tooling), i18n (via i18n-messaging skill conventions), Storybook coverage (via storybook-creation skill), and E2E tests (via e2e-test-creation skill)

phases.name: Backend Type & Pipeline Extensions
phases.description: Extend shared types and backend progress pipeline to carry file counts and error stage

tasks.title: Extend shared types
tasks.description: Add filesDownloaded, filesTotal to MithrilBootstrapStatusUpdate and stage to MithrilBootstrapError in source/common/types/mithril-bootstrap.types.ts

tasks.title: Update mithrilProgress parser
tasks.description: Extend MithrilProgressUpdate and parseMithrilProgressUpdate to preserve raw files_downloaded and files_total instead of only converting to percentage

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapService progress
tasks.description: In _downloadSnapshot(), include filesDownloaded and filesTotal from progress update in _updateStatus() call. Annotate errors with stage: 'download' | 'verify' | 'convert'

tasks.title: Annotate node-start failure stage
tasks.description: In handleDiskSpace.ts where _updateStatus({ status: 'failed' }) is called for node-start failures, set error.stage to 'node-start'

tasks.title: Update backend unit tests
tasks.description: Extend MithrilBootstrapService.spec.ts to verify filesDownloaded/filesTotal preservation and stage annotation on errors

phases.name: Store & Container Updates
phases.description: Extend MobX store with download metadata observables and computed properties

tasks.title: Add store observables and computeds
tasks.description: Add @observable filesDownloaded, filesTotal and @computed bytesDownloaded, throughputBps to MithrilBootstrapStore. Update _updateStatus action to assign file count fields

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapPage container
tasks.description: Pass new store observables (filesDownloaded, filesTotal, bytesDownloaded, throughputBps, customChainPath, chainStorageValidation, isChainStorageLoading) and actions (setChainStorageDirectory, resetChainStorageDirectory) through to the component

phases.name: Custom Chain Storage Location
phases.description: Add IPC channels, ChainStorageManager, symlink handling, and store actions to let users redirect the chain/db directory to an alternative location (e.g., external drives)

tasks.title: Add chain storage shared types
tasks.description: Add ChainStorageConfig ({ customPath: string | null; isSymlinked: boolean; resolvedPath: string }) and ChainStorageValidation ({ isValid: boolean; availableSpace: number; isWritable: boolean; error?: string }) to source/common/types/mithril-bootstrap.types.ts

tasks.title: Add chain storage IPC channels
tasks.description: Define SET_CHAIN_STORAGE_DIRECTORY_CHANNEL and GET_CHAIN_STORAGE_DIRECTORY_CHANNEL in source/common/ipc/api.ts with request/response types. Create main-side handlers in source/main/ipc/chainStorageChannels.ts and renderer-side clients in source/renderer/app/ipc/chainStorageChannels.ts

tasks.title: Implement ChainStorageManager
tasks.description: Create source/main/utils/chainStorageManager.ts with methods: validate(targetDir) — checks writable, sufficient space, not inside stateDir; setDirectory(targetDir) — migrate data, create symlink (POSIX symlink on Linux/macOS, NTFS junction on Windows), persist config; resetToDefault() — copy data back, remove symlink, remove config; migrateData(from, to) — fs.move() with cross-device fallback; verifySymlink() — check target exists on startup; getConfig() — read chain-storage-config.json. Use fs.lstat() to detect symlinks vs real directories.

tasks.title: Integrate ChainStorageManager with disk space and downloads
tasks.description: Update handleDiskSpace.ts to resolve symlinks via fs.realpath() before calling checkDiskSpace(), so disk space is checked against the actual target drive. Pass custom directory as workDir when constructing MithrilBootstrapService so mithril-client downloads snapshot data directly to the target location (avoids needing double disk space for download + move). Update MithrilBootstrapService._installSnapshot() to use resolved real paths when comparing dbDirectory === chainDir.

tasks.title: Add chain storage store actions
tasks.description: Add to MithrilBootstrapStore: @observable customChainPath (string | null), chainStorageValidation (ChainStorageValidation | null), isChainStorageLoading (boolean), storageLocationConfirmed (boolean — false until user clicks Continue on storage picker). Add @action setChainStorageDirectory(path) — sends to main via SET_CHAIN_STORAGE_DIRECTORY_CHANNEL, updates observables; resetChainStorageDirectory() — sends null to main; loadChainStorageConfig() — called on store init via GET_CHAIN_STORAGE_DIRECTORY_CHANNEL; confirmStorageLocation() — sets storageLocationConfirmed = true to advance to decision view.

tasks.title: Add startup symlink verification
tasks.description: Call ChainStorageManager.verifySymlink() during app initialization in source/main/index.ts or handleDiskSpace. If broken symlink detected (target directory missing/inaccessible), surface warning through MithrilBootstrapStore so the UI can prompt the user to reconnect the drive or reset to default.

tasks.title: Unit tests for ChainStorageManager
tasks.description: Create source/main/utils/chainStorageManager.spec.ts. Test: validate() rejects paths inside stateDir, rejects non-writable dirs, rejects insufficient space; setDirectory() creates symlink and persists config; resetToDefault() removes symlink and restores real dir; migrateData() handles cross-device move fallback; verifySymlink() detects broken symlinks. Mock fs module.

phases.name: i18n Message Extraction
phases.description: Extract and extend i18n messages before component decomposition. Follow i18n-messaging skill conventions.

tasks.title: Extract i18n messages file
tasks.description: Create MithrilBootstrap.messages.ts using defineMessages() with all 19 existing entries plus ~8 new messages for stage-specific error titles/hints, download metadata labels, step indicator labels, and ~6 new messages for storage location picker (directory label, change button, reset button, space available, validation errors). Conventions: (1) Message IDs use 'mithril.bootstrap.<messageKey>' dot-separated format, (2) all defaultMessage values prefixed with '!!!', (3) every message includes 'description' field for translators, (4) placeholders use {variableName} syntax documented in description

tasks.title: Run i18n manage workflow
tasks.description: Run 'yarn i18n:manage' (combines extract + check) to sync translations and validate across en-US and ja-JP locales. Verify updated files: translations/messages.json, source/renderer/app/i18n/locales/en-US.json, source/renderer/app/i18n/locales/ja-JP.json. Do NOT run i18n:extract separately — i18n:manage includes it.

phases.name: Component Decomposition
phases.description: Break monolithic MithrilBootstrap.tsx into focused sub-components

tasks.title: Implement MithrilStepIndicator
tasks.description: New component modeled on SyncingProgress.tsx with 4 steps (preparing, downloading, verifying, finalizing), spinner/checkmark/pending states, and download metadata display

tasks.title: Implement MithrilSnapshotSelector
tasks.description: Extract and improve snapshot dropdown with truncated digest labels ({first8}...{last8}), locale-aware dates, and formatted size in option labels

tasks.title: Implement MithrilSnapshotDetails
tasks.description: Extract metadata grid (digest, date, size, node version) into dedicated component with truncated digest display

tasks.title: Implement MithrilErrorView
tasks.description: Stage-specific error screens with contextual titles/hints for download, verify, convert, node-start, and generic stages. Collapsible error code details and log path link

tasks.title: Implement MithrilProgressView
tasks.description: Compose MithrilStepIndicator + ProgressBarLarge + timing metadata + cancel button. Show bytesDownloaded/bytesTotal and throughput during download step

tasks.title: Implement MithrilDecisionView
tasks.description: Extract decision screen with title, description, MithrilSnapshotSelector, MithrilSnapshotDetails, and accept/decline buttons. Shown AFTER the storage location picker screen has been confirmed — does NOT contain the storage picker itself.

tasks.title: Implement MithrilStorageLocationPicker
tasks.description: Preliminary screen shown BEFORE the decision view — user must confirm or change storage location before seeing snapshot/sync options. Shows current chain storage path (default or custom), available disk space on target drive (formatted with prettysize), and validation feedback. 'Change location' button triggers SHOW_OPEN_DIALOG_CHANNEL with properties: ['openDirectory', 'createDirectory']. 'Reset to default' link (shown only with custom path) calls resetChainStorageDirectory(). 'Continue' button proceeds to decision view. Shows spinner + 'Moving chain data...' during migration. Picker disabled when bootstrap status is preparing/downloading/verifying/converting. Snapshot downloads go directly to the selected directory (via MithrilBootstrapService workDir) to avoid needing double disk space. Props: customChainPath, chainStorageValidation, isChainStorageLoading, onSelectDirectory(), onResetToDefault(), onContinue(), resolvedChainPath, availableSpace.

tasks.title: Slim down root MithrilBootstrap.tsx
tasks.description: Reduce to overlay chrome (backdrop + centered card) + view delegation based on status. Route: storage picker screen → decision screen → progress/error screens. Create index.ts re-export

phases.name: Theming & Styling
phases.description: Migrate hardcoded colors to CSS theme variables using theme-management skill tooling. Do NOT manually edit theme output files.

tasks.title: Migrate SCSS to theme variables
tasks.description: Replace all hardcoded backdrop/card/text/button colors in MithrilBootstrap.scss and new SCSS files with --theme-mithril-* CSS custom properties. Follow naming pattern: --theme-mithril-[element]-[property]

tasks.title: Add theme variables to createTheme
tasks.description: Add --theme-mithril-card-background, --theme-mithril-text-color, --theme-mithril-text-secondary, --theme-mithril-button-primary-background, etc. to createTheme in source/renderer/app/themes/utils/constants.ts with both 'light' and 'dark' values. Do NOT manually edit theme output files (cardano.ts, light-blue.ts, etc.)

tasks.title: Run theme validation and update
tasks.description: Run 'yarn themes:check:createTheme' to validate consistency between createTheme and theme output files. Then run 'yarn themes:update' to propagate new --theme-mithril-* variables to ALL theme files automatically. Verify with 'yarn prettier:check && yarn compile'

tasks.title: Regenerate SCSS type definitions
tasks.description: Run 'yarn typedef:sass' after all SCSS changes to regenerate .scss.d.ts files for new modules

phases.name: Accessibility & Storybook
phases.description: Add a11y attributes and full Storybook coverage using storybook-creation skill conventions

tasks.title: Add accessibility attributes
tasks.description: Add role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow/min/max, aria-live='polite' on step indicator, aria-label on buttons and Select, ensure keyboard navigability

tasks.title: Create Storybook stories
tasks.description: Create storybook/stories/loading/MithrilBootstrap.stories.tsx with 16 stories using storiesOf('Loading / Mithril Bootstrap', module) API (NOT CSF). Use StoryDecorator for theme + withKnobs for interactive props. Cover states: Decision (Loading, With Snapshots, Specific Snapshot), Progress (Preparing, Downloading early/mid, Verifying, Finalizing), Error (Download, Verify, Convert, Node Start), Storage (Default Path, Custom Path, Validation Error, Migrating). Import component via relative path from source/renderer/app/components/loading/mithril-bootstrap/

tasks.title: Register stories in barrel file
tasks.description: Create storybook/stories/loading/ domain directory. Add "import './loading/MithrilBootstrap.stories'" to storybook/stories/index.ts barrel file under a '// Loading' comment section. Verify story appears in Storybook navigation.

phases.name: E2E Tests
phases.description: Create Cucumber BDD end-to-end tests for Mithril bootstrap flow using e2e-test-creation skill conventions

tasks.title: Create E2E feature file
tasks.description: Create tests/mithril/e2e/features/mithril-bootstrap.feature with @e2e tag. Include Background with basic setup, then scenarios for: (1) Decision screen displays with snapshot selector, (2) User accepts bootstrap and enters progress, (3) User declines bootstrap, (4) Progress stages advance through stepper, (5) Error screen displays stage-specific messaging, (6) Cancel during progress, (7) Storage location change to external directory, (8) Storage location reset to default, (9) Storage location with insufficient space shows error, (10) Storage picker disabled during active sync. Use daedalus.stores.mithrilBootstrap to set state since real bootstrap requires cardano-node.

tasks.title: Write E2E step definitions
tasks.description: Create tests/mithril/e2e/steps/mithril-bootstrap.ts with: (1) SELECTORS const grouping all CSS class selectors matching SCSS module output (e.g., '.MithrilBootstrap_component', '.MithrilDecisionView_acceptButton', '.MithrilStorageLocationPicker_changeButton', '.MithrilStorageLocationPicker_resetLink'), (2) async function step definitions (not arrow functions), (3) Chai expect assertions, (4) this.client.execute() for setting store state (including customChainPath and chainStorageValidation), (5) this.waitAndClick() and this.client.waitForVisible() for DOM interaction.

phases.name: Verification
phases.description: Run all checks and verify correctness including theme validation, i18n validation, and storybook rendering

tasks.title: Run verification suite
tasks.description: Run full verification: (1) yarn compile — no TS errors, (2) yarn lint — clean, (3) yarn prettier:check — clean, (4) yarn themes:check:createTheme — all mithril theme vars consistent across themes, (5) yarn i18n:manage — all messages extracted and validated for en-US/ja-JP, (6) yarn test:jest — unit tests pass including ChainStorageManager tests, (7) yarn storybook — all 16 stories render correctly, (8) yarn typedef:sass — SCSS types up to date
